protocol.candidate: Liu-Zhou-Zhu multiscale price-volume trend measure; 9 price and 9 traded-value MA ratios
protocol.coefficient_estimation: monthly cross-sectional OLS of month-t return on month-(t-1) features; EMA coefficient forecast lambda=0.02
protocol.universe: latest B070 PIT 800-member snapshot visible at each month-end
protocol.execution: signal after month-end close; entry at first later tradestatus=1 open; N1 exits at the earliest legal T+1 close; N20/N60 exit at the first tradeable close at/after their entry-inclusive session target
protocol.primary: N20 monthly cross-sectional rank-IC for amount-proxy PV trend
protocol.confirmation: N60; N1 control; share-volume-only fixed sensitivity
protocol.baseline: classic 12-1 momentum on identical PIT rows and forward labels
protocol.inference: Newey-West lag 3 and circular 6-month block bootstrap, 5000 draws

literature.published_result_context: 2005-2018 long-short factor evidence is prior evidence only; this runner tests the predictive measure in a later, narrower long-only-compatible universe

portfolio_execution_blockers: qfq open cannot size 100-share lots at historical nominal prices
exact RMB traded amount is absent
historical ST and exact exchange limit prices are absent

exposures.industry_neutrality: not testable: the PIT data has no historical industry labels

interpretation_limits: This is a signal first-look, not a portfolio backtest or investment recommendation.
B070 covers a liquid HS300/CSI500/SSE50-derived 800-name PIT subset, not the full A-share market used by the paper.
The paper uses RMB traded value; B070 lacks amount, so qfq close * share volume is the preregistered primary proxy and share volume is a sensitivity.
PIT industry labels are unavailable, so industry neutrality cannot be claimed; market cap, volatility, liquidity, and recent-return exposures are diagnostic only.
The 2018 start plus the paper's 400-session feature and 38-month coefficient warmups leaves a short post-2022 evaluation window.
Historical ST flags and exact limit prices are absent; the normal-board 10%/20% open-gap filter is conservative but incomplete.
Signal-date quintiles are frozen before entry. A name that opens limit-up keeps its intended slot in cash and is not replaced by a lower-ranked name.
